# CalcFYI Embed Widget

> Embeddable CalcFYI widgets for any website. Zero dependencies, Shadow DOM isolation, 4 themes (light/dark/sepia/auto).

## Quick Start

Add to any HTML page:
- Script: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/calcfyi-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>

## Links

- Main site: https://calcfyi.com
- Widget docs: https://widget.calcfyi.com
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/calcfyi-embed
- GitHub: https://github.com/fyipedia/calcfyi-embed
- API: https://calcfyi.com/developers/

## Guide FYI Widget Family

- [SalaryFYI Widget](https://widget.salaryfyi.com)
- [UnivFYI Widget](https://widget.univfyi.com)
- [BoardGameFYI Widget](https://widget.boardgamefyi.com)

## Part of FYIPedia

Open-source developer tools ecosystem — https://fyipedia.com
